{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200318994AE12855051545A513"}"},"total":373},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7191091741641491235","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书可以算是同系列中质量比较高的，没有无脑金手指，主角智商在线，希望作者大大好好的把这本书写完，不要烂尾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674306603,"group_id":"7172064339229150220","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+tRclzKvv+KlQM2UIiMW64=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/395b1c8e4e20458fb8c43b27a669c984~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787973&x-signature=ARANsgLdXjSreSx1BK%2BM15H60Z8%3D","user_id":"70848623411835","user_name":"阮初_"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"70848623411835","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7172064339229150220","book_info":{"abstract":"【自创怪谈+恐怖+直播+国运+无女主】
无尽的恐怖苏醒过来，化作无数个怪谈世界。
每个国家挑选一名天选者，通过每一个怪谈世界。
成功者，这个怪谈将永远无法降临背后的国家，并且带来国运。
失败者，怪谈世界降临，所有失败的灵魂将不再有属于自己的生命。
叶枫，来自平行世界的恐怖小说爱好者，代表龙国参加怪谈世界。
然而......
怪谈不仅仅是怪谈，每个怪谈似乎拥有自己的生命。
怪谈1：K医院，怪谈2：幸福电影院，怪谈3：温柔之妻，怪谈4：微笑快递，怪谈5：活着殡仪馆。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o58d76011833aefb2e0917ef0346d2446~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"萌新快乐手","author_id":"","book_id":"7172064339229150220","book_name":"规则怪谈：我能看到错误项","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5246人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7172069916059796001","read_count":"5246","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"301670"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"142","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/511496376dca4a4abcc04ecc44cc73c8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451398&x-signature=UMF%2B0tCC3X7vuH9HvvEoNv8vUIY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4001876731766503","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2262217e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320
